tagline: Export context as metric view: You can now export the context from a Genie Space as a metric view to centrally define your business semantics.
what_it_does: Export context as metric view: You can now export the context from a Genie Space as a metric view to centrally define your business semantics. Iframe monitoring (Beta): Messages from iframe embedded Genie One spaces are now logged in the Monitoring tab. Compliance security profile iframe embed (Beta): Customers with compliance security profile enabled can now enable embedding Genie Spaces as an iframe.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Export context as metric view: You can now export the context from a Genie Space as a metric view to centrally define your business semantics. Iframe monitoring (Beta): Messages from iframe embedded Genie One spaces are now logged in the Monitoring tab.
key_takeaway: Export context as metric view: You can now export the context from a Genie Space as a metric view to centrally define your business semantics.
